text:
……貴方の活躍、よく聞くわ
とても頑張っているのね。

……そこまで活躍しているなら
スキルアップを図って、もうちょっと
成長したいって思ったりしてない……？

……もしそう思うなら
今の実力とこれからの可能性を
私に見せてもらえないかしら。

……その証に
Ｆｏエクスキューブを１個
私に持っ

You seem to be working diligently. I hear of
your accomplishments with some frequency.

That being the case, do you ever feel a need
to polish your skills and develop further still?

If so... perhaps you should show me what
you're capable of now and what you believe
could be done in the future.

In order to do that, I'd like you to bring me...
one FO EX-Cube.
